$comment: Custom property overrides applied AFTER auto-generation from wokwi-elements. Add entries here to customize controls, add new properties, or change defaults. These survive metadata regeneration. Use `_customComponents` to inject Velxio-only parts not defined in wokwi-elements.

_customComponents.name: A4988 Stepper Driver
_customComponents.description: A4988 bipolar stepper motor driver (STEP/DIR). Pulse STEP to advance one step; DIR sets the direction; MS1-MS3 select microstepping. Outputs 1A/1B (coil A) and 2A/2B (coil B) to a stepper's A+/A-/B+/B- terminals.
_customComponents.thumbnail:
<svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#1a2332" rx="4"/>
    <rect x="16" y="7" width="32" height="50" rx="3" fill="#0b3d2e" stroke="#2d8f5a" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <rect x="25" y="25" width="14" height="14" rx="1" fill="#15151a" stroke="#333"/>
    <text x="32" y="19" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#cfe8d8" font-weight="bold">A4988</text>
    <g fill="#d4af37"><rect x="11" y="14" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="11" y="22" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="11" y="30" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="11" y="38" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="48" y="14" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="48" y="22" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="48" y="30" width="5" height="2"/><rect x="48" y="38" width="5" height="2"/></g>
    <text x="32" y="51" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="#8fbfa6">STEP/DIR</text></svg>

_customComponents.name: AND Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input AND logic gate. Output Y = A · B.

_customComponents.name: NAND Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input NAND logic gate. Output Y = NOT(A · B).

_customComponents.name: OR Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input OR logic gate. Output Y = A + B.

_customComponents.name: NOR Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input NOR logic gate. Output Y = NOT(A + B).

_customComponents.name: XOR Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input XOR logic gate. Output Y = A ⊕ B.

_customComponents.name: XNOR Gate
_customComponents.description: 2-input XNOR logic gate. Output Y = NOT(A ⊕ B).

_customComponents.name: NOT Gate (Inverter)
_customComponents.description: 1-input inverter. Output Y = NOT(A).

_customComponents.name: 2N2222 (NPN BJT)
_customComponents.description: General-purpose NPN bipolar transistor. The go-to part for low-power switching and small-signal amplification.

_customComponents.name: BC547 (NPN BJT)
_customComponents.description: Small-signal NPN bipolar transistor, European equivalent of 2N3904. High gain (~400).

_customComponents.name: 2N3055 (NPN Power BJT)
_customComponents.description: Power NPN bipolar transistor. 15A / 60V / 115W TO-3 package. Classic audio amp output stage.

_customComponents.name: 2N3906 (PNP BJT)
_customComponents.description: General-purpose PNP bipolar transistor. Complement of the 2N3904/2N2222.

_customComponents.name: BC557 (PNP BJT)
_customComponents.description: Small-signal PNP bipolar transistor. Complement of the BC547.

_customComponents.name: 2N7000 (N-MOSFET)
_customComponents.description: Logic-level N-channel MOSFET. Vth ≈ 1.6 V, fully enhanced at 3.3 V — perfect for GPIO-driven load switching.

_customComponents.name: IRF540 (N-MOSFET Power)
_customComponents.description: Power N-channel MOSFET. Vth ≈ 3 V (needs 10 V for full enhancement), 33 A / 100 V, R_DS(on) ≈ 77 mΩ. Classic motor / solenoid driver.

_customComponents.name: IRF9540 (P-MOSFET)
_customComponents.description: Power P-channel MOSFET. Used for high-side load switching with logic input.

_customComponents.name: FQP27P06 (P-MOSFET)
_customComponents.description: Logic-level P-channel MOSFET. Suitable for 3.3V / 5V gate drive.

_customComponents.name: Ideal Op-Amp
_customComponents.description: Idealized operational amplifier. Infinite gain, infinite input impedance, no saturation. Use for textbook circuits where real-chip limitations are irrelevant.

_customComponents.name: LM358 (Dual Op-Amp)
_customComponents.description: Dual single-supply op-amp. Output swings close to both rails. Ideal for MCU-powered signal conditioning.

_customComponents.name: LM741 (Op-Amp)
_customComponents.description: Classic general-purpose op-amp. Requires ~1.5V of headroom from each supply rail. Used in didactic circuits.

_customComponents.name: TL072 (JFET Op-Amp)
_customComponents.description: JFET-input dual op-amp. Very high input impedance, low noise — audio and instrumentation.

_customComponents.name: LM324 (Quad Op-Amp)
_customComponents.description: Quad single-supply op-amp. Same electrical spec as LM358, four channels per package.

_customComponents.name: 7805 (+5V Linear Regulator)
_customComponents.description: Fixed +5V linear regulator, 1A, TO-220. Dropout ≈ 2V. Classic MCU power supply.

_customComponents.name: 7812 (+12V Linear Regulator)
_customComponents.description: Fixed +12V linear regulator, 1A, TO-220. Dropout ≈ 2V. Motor drivers, fan supplies.

_customComponents.name: 7905 (−5V Linear Regulator)
_customComponents.description: Fixed −5V linear regulator, 1A, TO-220. Negative-rail complement of the 7805.

_customComponents.name: LM317 (Adjustable Linear Regulator)
_customComponents.description: Adjustable +1.25V to +37V linear regulator. V_out = 1.25·(1 + R2/R1). Versatile workhorse.

_customComponents.name: 9V Battery
_customComponents.description: PP3 / 6LR61 9V alkaline battery. Modelled as 9V DC with ~1.5Ω internal resistance.

_customComponents.name: AA Battery (1.5V)
_customComponents.description: AA alkaline cell. 1.5V, low ESR (~0.15Ω). Pair up for 3V/4.5V/6V packs.

_customComponents.name: Coin Cell (CR2032, 3V)
_customComponents.description: Lithium coin cell. 3V, high ESR (~10Ω) — limits peak current.

_customComponents.name: AND Gate (3-input)
_customComponents.description: 3-input AND gate. Output Y = A · B · C.

_customComponents.name: OR Gate (3-input)
_customComponents.description: 3-input OR gate. Output Y = A + B + C.

_customComponents.name: NAND Gate (3-input)
_customComponents.description: 3-input NAND gate.

_customComponents.name: NOR Gate (3-input)
_customComponents.description: 3-input NOR gate.

_customComponents.name: AND Gate (4-input)
_customComponents.description: 4-input AND gate.

_customComponents.name: OR Gate (4-input)
_customComponents.description: 4-input OR gate.

_customComponents.name: NAND Gate (4-input)
_customComponents.description: 4-input NAND gate.

_customComponents.name: NOR Gate (4-input)
_customComponents.description: 4-input NOR gate.

_customComponents.name: Diode (generic)
_customComponents.description: Generic silicon diode. Vf ≈ 0.7 V. Use for textbook rectification examples.

_customComponents.name: 1N4148 (Small-Signal Diode)
_customComponents.description: Small-signal silicon diode. Fast switching, low capacitance. Go-to for logic-level protection.

_customComponents.name: 1N4007 (1 kV Rectifier)
_customComponents.description: 1 A / 1000 V silicon rectifier diode. Mains bridge rectifiers, back-EMF protection.

_customComponents.name: 1N4733 (5.1 V Zener)
_customComponents.description: 5.1 V Zener diode, 1 W. Voltage reference / regulator / ESD clamp.

_customComponents.name: 1N5817 (Schottky 20V)
_customComponents.description: Schottky diode, 1 A / 20 V. Vf ≈ 0.32 V at 1 A. Used in low-drop rectification and reverse-polarity protection.

_customComponents.name: 1N5819 (Schottky 40V)
_customComponents.description: Schottky diode, 1 A / 40 V. Higher breakdown than 1N5817, same low Vf.

_customComponents.name: L293D (Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver)
_customComponents.description: Dual H-bridge motor driver IC. Each channel: EN, IN1, IN2 drive OUT1/OUT2 with the motor supply voltage (VCC2). Rated 600 mA continuous / 1.2 A peak per channel.

_customComponents.name: D Flip-Flop
_customComponents.description: Edge-triggered D-type flip-flop. On rising edge of CLK, Q ← D. Digital simulation only (SPICE cannot do edge detection in .op analysis).

_customComponents.name: T Flip-Flop
_customComponents.description: Toggle flip-flop. On rising CLK, Q ← Q ⊕ T (toggles when T=1). Useful for frequency dividers and counters.

_customComponents.name: JK Flip-Flop
_customComponents.description: JK flip-flop. On rising CLK: J=0/K=0 hold, J=1/K=0 set, J=0/K=1 reset, J=1/K=1 toggle.

_customComponents.name: 74HC00 (Quad 2-input NAND)
_customComponents.description: Four 2-input NAND gates in one 14-pin DIP package. 74HC family (high-speed CMOS).

_customComponents.name: 74HC02 (Quad 2-input NOR)
_customComponents.description: Four 2-input NOR gates in one 14-pin DIP package.

_customComponents.name: 74HC04 (Hex Inverter)
_customComponents.description: Six NOT gates (inverters) in one 14-pin DIP package.

_customComponents.name: 74HC08 (Quad 2-input AND)
_customComponents.description: Four 2-input AND gates in one 14-pin DIP package.

_customComponents.name: 74HC14 (Hex Schmitt Inverter)
_customComponents.description: Six Schmitt-trigger inverters in one 14-pin DIP package. Provides input hysteresis — essential for debouncing noisy signals.

_customComponents.name: 74HC32 (Quad 2-input OR)
_customComponents.description: Four 2-input OR gates in one 14-pin DIP package.

_customComponents.name: 74HC86 (Quad 2-input XOR)
_customComponents.description: Four 2-input XOR gates in one 14-pin DIP package.

_customComponents.name: 4N25 (Optocoupler)
_customComponents.description: Single-channel optocoupler with IR LED + phototransistor. CTR ≈ 50%. Provides galvanic isolation between two circuits.

_customComponents.name: PC817 (Optocoupler)
_customComponents.description: Single-channel optocoupler. CTR 80–600% (typ. 100%). Higher drive than 4N25, commonly used for MCU-to-mains isolation.

_customComponents.name: Relay (SPDT)
_customComponents.description: 5-pin single-pole double-throw electromechanical relay. Coil drives SPDT contacts with native switch hysteresis. Optional integrated flyback diode.

_customComponents.name: Photodiode
_customComponents.description: Light-sensitive diode. Reverse current proportional to illumination. Property: lux (ambient light intensity).

_customComponents.name: Regulated Power Supply
_customComponents.thumbnail:
<svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <rect width="64" height="64" fill="#1a2332" rx="4"/>
      <rect x="10" y="14" width="44" height="30" fill="#2a3548" rx="3" stroke="#4a5878"/>
      <text x="32" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-family="monospace" fill="#4ade80" font-weight="bold">5.00V</text>
      <text x="32" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-family="monospace" fill="#fbbf24">1.00A</text>
      <circle cx="18" cy="52" r="3" fill="#dc2626"/>
      <circle cx="46" cy="52" r="3" fill="#0f172a" stroke="#64748b"/>
      <text x="32" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" fill="#9d9d9d">PSU</text>
    </svg>
_customComponents.description: Bench DC/AC power supply with optional current limit. DC mode for fixed rails (5V, 12V, etc.); AC mode for sine sources. Visually shares the signal-generator chassis so no new Web Component is needed. The current limit is enforced by the circuit verifier — if any load pulls more than the configured amperage, Run is blocked with a 'source-overload' warning, mimicking a real bench supply's foldback behavior.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: DC for fixed rails, AC for sine waveform output

properties.name: voltage
properties.description: Output voltage in V (DC mode) or peak amplitude (AC mode)

properties.name: currentLimit
properties.description: Maximum sourced current in A. The verifier warns when exceeded.

_customComponents.name: Signal Generator
_customComponents.description: Benchtop AC/DC signal source. Sine, square, or DC output. Configurable frequency, amplitude, DC offset.

properties.name: amplitude
properties.description: Peak amplitude in V (ignored for DC)

_customComponents.name: Cap. ceramic (custom)

_customComponents.thumbnail:
<svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#1a2332" rx="4"/>

_customComponents.$comment: I2C-backpack variant of LCD1602: reuses the wokwi-lcd1602 web component but renders the 4-pin I2C header (GND/VCC/SDA/SCL) instead of the parallel 16-pin header. ProtocolParts registers the matching HD44780 + PCF8574 decoder so Arduino sketches using LiquidCrystal_I2C work out of the box.
_customComponents.name: LCD 16x2 (I2C)
_customComponents.thumbnail: <svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#0b1226" rx="4"/><rect x="6" y="18" width="52" height="28" rx="2" fill="#6cb201"/><rect x="10" y="22" width="44" height="20" fill="#85cb15"/><text x="32" y="31" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">Hello World</text><text x="32" y="38" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">I2C 16x2 OK</text><rect x="3" y="48" width="58" height="4" fill="#222"/><text x="32" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-family="sans-serif" fill="#e5e7eb" font-weight="bold">I2C</text></svg>

properties.name: i2cAddress
properties.description: I2C address of the PCF8574 backpack (typical: 0x27 or 0x3F)

_customComponents.$comment: I2C-backpack variant of LCD2004. Same PCF8574+HD44780 protocol, but 20x4 geometry and 2004 row offsets (0x00, 0x40, 0x14, 0x54).
_customComponents.name: LCD 20x4 (I2C)
_customComponents.thumbnail: <svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#0b1226" rx="4"/><rect x="4" y="12" width="56" height="36" rx="2" fill="#6cb201"/><rect x="8" y="16" width="48" height="28" fill="#85cb15"/><text x="32" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">LCD 20 x 4 char</text><text x="32" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">I2C @ 0x27</text><text x="32" y="37" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">line three text</text><text x="32" y="43" text-anchor="middle" font-size="5" font-family="monospace" fill="#0d0d0d" font-weight="bold">line four below</text><rect x="3" y="50" width="58" height="4" fill="#222"/><text x="32" y="61" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-family="sans-serif" fill="#e5e7eb" font-weight="bold">I2C</text></svg>

properties.name: i2cAddress
properties.description: I2C address of the PCF8574 backpack

_customComponents.$comment: Picker shortcut for SSD1306 in I2C mode — same wokwi-ssd1306 element, but the user finds it by name without having to discover the protocol selector on the generic ssd1306 entry. Issue #101.
_customComponents.name: SSD1306 OLED (I2C)
_customComponents.thumbnail: <svg width="64" height="64" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="64" height="64" fill="#0b1226" rx="4"/><rect x="8" y="14" width="48" height="32" rx="2" fill="#000"/><text x="32" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-family="monospace" fill="#9be1ff" font-weight="bold">SSD1306</text><text x="32" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="6" font-family="monospace" fill="#9be1ff">I2C 0x3C</text><text x="32" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" font-family="sans-serif" fill="#e5e7eb" font-weight="bold">SDA SCL</text></svg>

ky-040.name: KY-040 Rotary Encoder
ky-040.description: KY-040 incremental rotary encoder with push-button. Turning the knob outputs quadrature pulses on CLK and DT (direction = which leads); the shaft press drives an active-low SW. Reads from any board's GPIO.
